title: cDNA Synthesis Protocol
author: Igem Dusseldorf
license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.8hhht36
materials: use 200 ng of RNA for reaction
used directly or stored at -20° C

steps.title: for cDNA synthesis use sythesis Kit for e
steps.instruction: for cDNA synthesis use sythesis Kit for e.g. the BioRad iScript cDNA synthesis Kit (Cat.# 1708891)

steps.title: the reaction protocol reverse transcription was...
steps.instruction: the reaction protocol reverse transcription was carried out at 42° C for 30 min

steps.title: The reverse transcriptaseinactivation was performed at...
steps.instruction: The reverse transcriptaseinactivation was performed at 85° C for 5 min
